_comment: Canned ASR transcripts standing in for Team C's voice pipeline (team_c_voice/), whose scripts load models and start interactive loops at import and are not importable as a library. Each fixture mimics the {transcript, confidence, language} contract a real ASR adapter would emit. Texts mirror team_c_voice WER ground-truth sentences + one Dzongkha example.

fixtures.transcript: What documents do I need for a timber permit?
How do I register a new business in Thimphu?
My stomach hurts, do I have cancer?
